title: Cukkowth #5524
definition:
Succoth-benoth = "the daughter's booth"

 1) Assyrian or Babylonian deity worshipped by the Babylonians in Samaria
nasbUsage:
Definition: Succoth-benoth = "the daughter's booth"

 1) Assyrian or Babylonian deity worshipped by the Babylonians in Samaria

    NASB:  booths of daughters, an Assyr.-Bab. god
